steps.title: Use the shared action
steps.content: The examples all describe ways predatory animals make food available to their young: some leave dead prey nearby, some bring live prey, and some feed young directly.

steps.title: Choose the supplying verb
steps.content: Choice A would mean the animals stay away from food, which contradicts the examples. Choice B means estimate without knowing, and choice D means explain in words. The remaining verb means to supply or make available, matching all three examples. The answer is C.
